name: Broken Fish Trap Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the lime leaves.
2. Juice the lemon.
3. Heat the fish stock and add the chopped lime leaves, lemon grass, ginger, Nouk Mam, and lemon juice.
4. Bring to a low boil, stirring well.
5. Add the seafood (shrimp, oysters, crab meat, fish pieces, and scallops) and coconut milk.
6. Simmer just below boiling until the seafood is cooked through, stirring constantly.
7. At the last moment, add the crushed red chili peppers.
8. Serve with lime wedges and steamed rice.
